sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides. healthiness depends a lot on preparation because breaded or heavily fried versions can shift the health profile substantially. needs careful storage and cooking because food safety risk is a real practical drawback versus some wholefoods. comes with ethical sourcing questions because production context may matter to some viewers beyond nutrition alone.
